items.title: Canada wildfires spread smoke across North America, prompting air quality alerts
items.summary: Smoke from more than 800 blazes has led to air quality concerns as far as Toronto, New York and large parts of Michigan, Minneapolis and Minnesota.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: What to Know About Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s Ousted Defense Minister
items.summary: Mr. Fedorov became the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. The move to replace him has prompted street protests.
